text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(It's been almost two weeks since the summer
solstice... and today's the day I finally debut.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(It's not quite time to leave yet... and Trainer
doesn't seem to be here yet either.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's see what my lucky color is today...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hmm. All right! I'll do it before Trainer gets here!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! What do you think of this door? ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I struggle to believe what I'm seeing. The entire
door has been painted a vibrant orange.
choice_data_list:
I'm going to have to submit a written apology
for this.

I'm going to have to submit a written apology
for this.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, c'mon! Look closely! It's just an orange
curtain!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's our first big race together! You want to start
out on a happy note, right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to get going! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wood, fire, earth, metal... Fire, earth, metal,
water!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey is warming up diligently. I decide
to give her some words of encouragement before
the big race.
choice_data_list: You're definitely going to win today!
You're definitely going to win today!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You think so? But I'm not sure it's going to be
that easy.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm not being negative. The flow of qi is actually
really good today, so I figured I should try being
cautious instead.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's times like these where it's most important to
be careful. ♪ If I get too cocky, I'll just end up
disrupting the qi. ☆

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Next up, it's Copano Rickey, whose hobbies
include feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whoa. So this is what a racecourse paddock looks
like. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Okay, sooo... What's going on with the
directions?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Got it. That way's southwest—the unlucky
direction. And then the runners' tunnel...
Hmm... ♪

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Look, she's got a toy... She's practically a
little kid.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
She looks kinda restless. Is she gonna be okay? I
bet she's gonna lose focus halfway through the
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spectators seem both amused by and
concerned about Copano Rickey. They're not
seeing beyond what their eyes can perceive of
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However innocent she might seem, Copano
Rickey is in no way a childish runner.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right. Now I know the environment. Today sure
is a special day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
After all, it's the day I brought the concept of
feng shui to the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yep, all the prep's done! Now all I need to do is
stay calm and go with the flow!
